creator: mhorne@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mitchell Horne from comment #31)

I didn't quite finish writing the comment. I've proposed an adjusted description for /boot/dtb/overlays in D40785. FYI the source of truth for the default is DTBODIR in bsd.own.mk.

Aside from this, is there anything else remaining that must be done before we can consider this bug 'fixed'?
